_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: histological examination revealed that the cancer incident rates in rb1;tp53 cKO and nf1;tp53 cKO fish (44% and 67%) were higher than nf1 KO fish (19%) at 6 months
details: 67% cancer incidence rate at 6 months, higher than nf1 KO fish (19%)
